summary: The user is planning a trip to Palm Springs from March 1-8 and inquired about the weather, activities, vegan-friendly restaurants, and visiting Joshua Tree National Park. The assistant provided detailed recommendations for outdoor activities, dining options, and scenic drives in the area.
facts: The user is visiting Palm Springs from March 1-8. The average high temperature in Palm Springs during March is around 79°F (26°C) and the average low is around 54°F (12°C). The user is interested in vegan-friendly restaurants in Palm Springs. Nature's Health Food & Cafe offers a variety of vegetarian and vegan options. Native Foods Cafe is a vegan chain restaurant serving plant-based dishes. Joshua Tree National Park is located about an hour's drive from Palm Springs. The Hidden Valley Nature Trail is a one-mile loop trail suitable for families and beginners. Keys View offers panoramic views of the Coachella Valley and the San Andreas Fault. The user is looking for shorter, less strenuous hikes in Joshua Tree National Park. The Barker Dam Trail is a 1.3-mile loop trail popular for families and beginners.
